parameters.jsCode:
const runAtIso = new Date().toISOString();
return [{ json: { runAtIso, runId: runAtIso.slice(0, 16) } }];

const d = $json;
const runAtIso = $('Compute Run Metadata').first().json.runAtIso;

const system = [
  "You are Agent #04 Editorial for invest.com.au. You review a single Tier 2 draft before it can pass the 4h Fin no-objection window that leads to auto-publish.",
  "Enforce the checks in .claude/agents/04-editorial.md §Prompt skeleton step 2, in this exact order:",
  "1. Forbidden phrases - 'we recommend', 'best for you', 'you should'. Any hit = reject (or revise if removable).",
  "2. Required structure - TL;DR first paragraph (30-60 words); H2/H3 body; FAQ 5-8 Q/A; Article + FAQPage + Organization JSON-LD.",
  "3. Compliance disclaimers - AFSL status, general-advice warning, crypto warning if applicable. Hardcoded disclaimers (not from lib/compliance.ts via compliance_refs) = reject.",
  "4. Byline - Tier 2 MUST be exactly 'invest.com.au Research Team'. Any named person on Tier 2 = reject.",
  "",
  "Return a single JSON block (```json ... ```) with keys:",
  "  action: one of 'approve' | 'revise' | 'reject'",
  "  reason: short rationale (<=240 chars)",
  "  forbidden_phrases_found: array of strings (empty if none)",
  "  missing_required: array from ['tldr','faq','jsonld_article','jsonld_faqpage','jsonld_organization','afsl_disclaimer','general_advice_warning','byline']",
  "  inline_edits: array of short diff-style suggestions (max 5, only when action='revise')",
  "Follow the JSON with a one-line plain-English digest.",
  "Strictness: if torn between approve and revise, choose revise. Revise is cheap; a bad publish is not."
].join('\n');

const user = [
  `Draft under review:`,
  `- id: ${d.id}`,
  `- title: ${d.title}`,
  `- slug: ${d.slug ?? '(none)'}`,
  `- tier: ${d.tier}`,
  `- byline: ${d.byline ?? '(none)'}`,
  `- author_name: ${d.author_name ?? '(none)'}`,
  `- target_publish_date: ${d.target_publish_date ?? '(none)'}`,
  `- created_at: ${d.created_at}`,
  ``,
  `Draft brief (jsonb):`,
  '```json',
  JSON.stringify(d.brief ?? {}, null, 2),
  '```',
  ``,
  `Draft metadata (jsonb):`,
  '```json',
  JSON.stringify(d.metadata ?? {}, null, 2),
  '```'
].join('\n');

return {
  json: {
    draft_id: d.id,
    draft_title: d.title,
    draft_tier: d.tier,
    draft_metadata_existing: d.metadata ?? {},
    system,
    user,
    runAtIso
  }
};

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ agent_name: 'editorial', level: ($('Parse Claude decision').item.json.action === 'reject' ? 'warn' : 'info'), message: ('Editorial publish gate: ' + $('Parse Claude decision').item.json.action + ' - ' + ($('Parse Claude decision').item.json.draft_title || '(untitled)')).slice(0, 240), metadata: { editorial_publish_gate: true, draft_id: $('Parse Claude decision').item.json.draft_id, draft_tier: $('Parse Claude decision').item.json.draft_tier, action: $('Parse Claude decision').item.json.action, reason: $('Parse Claude decision').item.json.reason, new_status: $('Parse Claude decision').item.json.new_status, needs_task: $('Parse Claude decision').item.json.needs_task, run_at: $('Parse Claude decision').item.json.runAtIso } }]) }}

={{ JSON.stringify([{ agent_name: 'editorial', level: 'info', message: 'Editorial publish gate: no drafts pending review', metadata: { editorial_publish_gate: true, note: 'no_drafts_pending', run_at: $('Compute Run Metadata').first().json.runAtIso } }]) }}
